footer.line1: Compact bilingual study companion for driving in Germany. Static, fast, no tracking.
footer.line2: Study aid only — rules simplified for learning. Your Fahrschule and the official StVO are the final word. Official sign artwork via the OSM Berlin traffic-sign collection & Wikimedia Commons (public domain, § 5 UrhG).
footer.print: Tip: Ctrl/Cmd + P prints any page as a paper cheatsheet.
home.title: Führerschein Guide — Driving in Germany
home.lead: A focused, bilingual study guide — one topic at a time instead of one endless page. Official sign artwork, plain-language rules, and the knowledge that actually gets tested.
home.path.note: Follow the steps in order — each page ends with a link to the next.
home.disc: Study aid only — rules are simplified for learning. Your Fahrschule and the official StVO catalogue are the final word.
home.marquee: Right before left · Half your speedo in metres · 0.5‰ — 0.0‰ in Probezeit · Rescue lane saves lives · Schulterblick every turn ·
signs.lead: Browse by category — each opens its own focused page — or search the whole catalogue right here. Official StVO artwork throughout.
errors.404_desc: This page doesn't exist — or the URL may have changed. Try the home page or use the navigation above.
